title: Australian Flatbread with Veggie Tapenade
description: A simple and flavorful flatbread topped with a delicious veggie tapenade, perfect for a quick and easy snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 cup (chopped bell peppers, onions, and zucchini)

instructions: Roll out the flatbread and brush with Australian olive oil.
Top the flatbread with chopped vegetables and crispy fried onions.
Drizzle with Tra and sprinkle with X (if using).
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the vegetables are tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
